command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git add   docs/vm-ecosystem-deployment-plan.md   docs/infrastructure-authority-map.md   docs/infrastructure-future-state-plan.md   docs/architectural-alignment-directive.md   && git commit -m 'Phase 9F.1 — vm-ecosystem provisioned and validated (Phases A-D complete)

Infrastructure changes:
- vm-ecosystem (.203) provisioned: Debian 13, git 2.47.3, Python 3.13.5
- SSH key installed, NOPASSWD sudo, hostname vm-ecosystem, static IP .203
- DNS locked via nohook resolv.conf (8.8.8.8/8.8.4.4/1.1.1.1)
- Moreno-AI cloned from Gitea at commit a2a963a
- All 7 runtimes verified: 4/8 agents, clock=audit_trail, confidence=high
- Phase D validation: vm-ecosystem matches vm-claude-hub on all checks

Documentation:
- docs/vm-ecosystem-deployment-plan.md (new)
- docs/infrastructure-authority-map.md (updated with .203)
- docs/infrastructure-future-state-plan.md (new)
- docs/architectural-alignment-directive.md (Infrastructure Authority Principle added)

Phase E (authority transition) pending Jose approval.' && git tag Phase9F1-vmEcosystemBringUp && git push origin main && git push github main && git push origin --tags && git push github --tags && echo 'COMMITTED_AND_TAGGED'
